topic: US government shutdown before Feb 2026 - meta prediction
summary: Key context: 43-day shutdown ended Nov 12, 2025. CR funds through Jan 30, 2026. Democrats threatening another shutdown. Meta-question asks if CP > 33.30% on Jan 16.
content:
From Metaculus post 40971 background:
- 43-day shutdown (Oct 1 - Nov 12, 2025) was longest in US history
- Trump signed CR funding through January 30, 2026
- Democrats hinting they are willing to shut down government again without ACA subsidy deal
- Partisan tensions remain high
- CR expires Jan 30, just 1 day before the Feb 1 deadline
- No indication of full-year appropriations progress

Meta question (post 41391): Will CP > 33.30% on Jan 16, 2026?
- 78 forecasters on meta question
- 70 forecasters on underlying question (post 40919)
- Published Jan 5, 2026; closes Jan 5; resolves Jan 16
- Threshold is relatively low at 33.30%

Key reasoning: On Jan 16, we'll be 14 days from CR expiration. Without a deal, shutdown probability should be well above 33%. The recent 43-day shutdown demonstrates Congressional dysfunction.
